metadata.title: Zohal — Documents become living workspaces
metadata.description: Turn folders of PDFs, contracts, and reports into living workspaces with source-linked answers your team can trust.

brand.name: Zohal
brand.tagline: Turn document collections into living workspaces.

hero.headline: Turn static contracts, reports, and PDFs into living timelines, dashboards, and follow-ups your team can actually use.
hero.subhead: Zohal pulls what matters from your documents, keeps every data point linked to the source, and instantly generates a clear workspace to review, track, and act.
hero.proofLine: Click back to source • Private-data controls and sanitization • Live answers grounded in your documents

credibilityStrip.label: Built for real review teams
items: Regional processing options across supported GCP regions, including Saudi, UAE, and the US
Arabic + English review with translation and localization checks
Second-pass verifier before export or handoff
WhatsApp, Google Drive, and OneDrive integrations

problem.title: Stop piecing the work together from files.
body: Important answers are often spread across contracts, reports, annexes, and supporting PDFs. Teams end up searching, cross-checking, and rebuilding the same context every time someone needs an answer, a date, or a decision.
Zohal gives your team one live place for the facts, timelines, follow-ups, and changes that matter, with the source always one click away.

sideCard.title: Dead files -> living workspace
before: Teams hunt through folders and PDFs to answer simple operational questions
Important changes stay buried in addendums, annexes, and revised versions
Every handoff rebuilds the same context in email, slides, and spreadsheets
after: Answers, dates, obligations, and exceptions stay live in one shared workspace
Changes across related files surface as clear updates your team can review
Every item can link back to the exact page and source text when needed

howItWorks.title: How documents become software.
howItWorks.subhead: Three steps: bring in the document set, structure what matters, and review the live workspace before sharing it.

steps.title: Bring in the files
steps.body: Import PDFs and related files from uploads, WhatsApp, Google Drive, and OneDrive. Zohal handles OCR cleanup and page parsing.

steps.title: Turn them into a living workspace
steps.body: Zohal maps key facts, timelines, obligations, and open questions into a source-linked interface your team can actually use.

steps.title: Review what changed and act
steps.body: Teams focus on updates, conflicts, and decisions before sharing, exporting, or handing work off.

items.label: High-stakes steps can wait for checked fields and human sign-off
Translation and localization review in one workflow
For every extracted field and flagged issue
Teams focus on mismatches instead of re-checking every page

stats.footnote: Final judgment stays with your team. Zohal helps you move faster without hiding the source, the checks, or the review decisions behind each result.

capabilities.title: What Zohal checks that generic AI does not.

tabs.label: Click-to-source fields
tabs.title: Important facts come out in a form your team can verify field by field.
bullets: Key details like parties, dates, totals, obligations, and terms are proposed as structured claims
Each claim stays linked to source evidence
Unclear or unsupported claims stay marked for review instead of being guessed

tabs.label: Generator + verifier
tabs.title: A second verifier checks unsupported, conflicting, or risky output before it moves.
bullets: A first pass proposes claims and a second pass challenges them
Missing support, contradictions, and policy conflicts are surfaced before anything is sent
Reviewers focus on exceptions instead of re-checking every page

tabs.label: Arabic + English workflows
tabs.title: Handle bilingual documents, translation checks, and localization review in one review flow.
bullets: Bring in files from uploads, WhatsApp, Google Drive, and OneDrive
Arabic and English documents can be reviewed together with translation and localization mismatches surfaced early
On supported web workflows, Zohal can process extracted document data without storing the original file

tabs.label: Decision packs
tabs.title: The workflow ends in something operational, not a chat transcript.
bullets: Generate share-ready summaries and reports
Build trackers for renewals, obligations, invoices, and follow-up work
Turn important dates into calendar-ready outputs

tabs.label: Private-data controls
tabs.title: Privacy, locality, sanitization, and access controls stay part of the workflow from intake to export.
bullets: Regional options cover supported GCP regions including Saudi, UAE, and the US
Customer files are not used to train models
Sensitive document data can be sanitized or kept out of broader sharing flows
Access can stay limited to the active team with review history available

applications.title: Where teams start first.
applications.subhead: Three high-value workflows where static documents quickly become living workspaces.

cards.title: Contract Workspaces
cards.subtitle: Turn contracts and policies into a live view of obligations, renewal terms, and risk areas your team can review together.
bullets: Clause-level source links behind every surfaced item
Policy and contract language kept in one shared workspace

cards.title: Amendment Trackers
cards.subtitle: See what changed across the document stack without reopening every addendum, annex, and supporting PDF.
bullets: Primary agreement versus addendum comparison
Conflicting terms surfaced as explicit updates

cards.title: Bilingual Workspaces
cards.subtitle: Review Arabic and English document sets together before anything is shared or approved.
bullets: Side-by-side evidence across both languages
Translation and localization mismatches surfaced early

decisionPack.title: Decision packs your team can actually defend.
bullets: Share-ready summaries for internal review or stakeholder delivery
Key facts and issues linked back to the source
Clear distinction between verified items, review items, and overrides
Export options for PDF, Word, and operational handoff

security.title: Privacy and control, built in.
leftBullets: Customer files are not used to train models
Regional deployment options cover supported GCP regions, including Saudi, UAE, and the US
Workspace access and review history support controlled collaboration
You can choose the model setup that fits your security, cost, and compliance needs

rightCard.title: Privacy and control in practice
bullets: On supported US web workflows, Zohal can process extracted document data without storing the original file on Zohal servers
On iOS, files can stay on device for private workflows
WhatsApp, Google Drive, and OneDrive fit how teams already receive and store files
Outputs stay structured for review, sharing, and follow-up

professional.name: Pro
bullets: Best for one person turning recurring document sets into living workspaces
Core workspace builder, source-linked answers, and follow-up tracking
Drive, OneDrive, and WhatsApp import included
10 GiB storage, 120M metered AI tokens, and 1,500 billable ops each month

professional.name: Max
bullets: Best for heavier individual workflows and bilingual document operations
Advanced Arabic/English workspace building, localization, and verification tools
Priority support and Google Drive sync
100 GiB storage, 500M metered AI tokens, and 6,000 billable ops each month

enterprise.name: Team
bullets: Best for a first live team rollout
Shared workspaces, permissions, and collaboration controls
14-day trial with card setup through Moyasar
250 GiB pooled storage, 1.5B metered tokens, and 20,000 pooled billable ops

enterprise.name: Enterprise
bullets: For larger rollouts, governance controls, and procurement support
Data-locality planning and custom onboarding
Shared rollout planning across multiple teams
Custom pricing, support, and deployment scope

usageMeter.title: Simple metering
usageMeter.body: Plans are measured by storage, AI usage, and completed workspace or export actions. If you are unsure which tier fits your workflow, book a demo and we will help map it.

insights.title: Where teams use Zohal first.
insights.subhead: Common review jobs where proof matters more than another generic summary.

items.title: Lease reviews with conflicting renewal dates
items.excerpt: Catch date conflicts across the main agreement and later amendments before the memo is sent.

items.title: Arabic/English contract checks before signature
items.excerpt: Compare both language versions and surface translation differences with linked evidence.

items.title: Fast first-pass review for amendment stacks
items.excerpt: Turn a messy bundle into a short, reviewable pack that highlights only what changed.

cta.label: Talk to us about your workflow

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: A few practical questions teams ask before they start.

items.q: How does Zohal use AI on important documents?
items.a: Zohal extracts the important fields from the document, links them back to the source, and runs a second verifier pass so weak or unsupported results stay marked for review.

items.q: Where can our data be processed?
items.a: Supported deployment regions include Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and the US.

items.q: Do you have to store our documents?
items.a: Not always. Supported US web workflows can process extracted data without storing the original file, and iOS private workflows can keep files on device.

items.q: Can we choose which AI models are used?
items.a: Yes. You can choose from multiple models, including open-source options.

items.q: Does it support Arabic and English documents together?
items.a: Yes. Zohal handles Arabic and English documents together, including scans, annexes, stamped pages, and translation or localization review.

items.q: What do we get at the end?
items.a: Share-ready reports, trackers, document search results, and calendar-ready dates.

contactRow.note: Want to see how this fits your workflow? We can tailor a sample output to your use case.

finalCta.title: See how your documents turn into a living workspace.
finalCta.subhead: We can show you how Zohal turns your files into a source-linked interface your team can search, review, and act on.

footer.legalNote: Watd Information Technology Company provides source-linked workflow software for document-driven operations. Your team remains responsible for legal review and final approvals.

ui.mentalModelLine: For contracts, reports, and document-heavy operations

modal.demoShowsBody: see how Zohal turns a document collection into a living workspace with source-linked facts, live updates, and clear next actions for the team.

mock.highlightSnippet: Flagged update: renewal notice terms do not match across related files.
mock.exceptionsQueueBody: Page 4 says "30 days" but Page 12 says "60 days".

decisionPackPreview.deliverablesBody: Ready for review, sharing, and operational follow-up.
